last_assistant_message:
Excellent! Now I have gathered all the information needed. Let me compile a comprehensive report of all the instances that need to be rebranded:

## Comprehensive Rebrand Analysis: Pi → DG-Pi

Based on my thorough search of the codebase, here are ALL instances that need to be changed from "Pi" to "DG-Pi":
